get.description: Returns paginated contact messages with optional status filtering
Returns paginated orders with optional status filtering

patch.description: Updates the status of an order

get.description: Returns paginated reports with optional filters

post.description: Bans the target user referenced in the report and closes the report

patch.description: Updates the status of a report

post.description: Change current user password
Send 6-digit code to user's email for password reset
Authenticate user with email and password
Deletes refresh token from Redis using user ID from JWT
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token stored in Redis
post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

post.description: Update password using email and reset code
Create a new user and send verification code
Confirm email by verification code sent to user

get.description: Returns the full category tree (all levels) as nested children. Root categories have parent_id = null.

put.description: Updates an existing comment. Only the comment owner or an admin can perform this action.

delete.description: Deletes a comment based on its ID. Only the comment owner or an admin can perform this action.

get.description: List live rooms with optional status filter

post.description: Create a new live room (product can be attached later)

get.description: Get live room details by id

delete.description: Delete a live room (owner or admin). Cannot delete while live.

get.description: Get last N chat messages (authenticated)

post.description: End a live room (owner or admin)
Attach products (allowed in scheduled and live). Reject if any product already attached.

patch.summary: Pin/unpin a product in live room

delete.description: Remove like/dislike for current user. Broadcasts realtime counts if room is live.

post.description: Auth user dislikes the live room (removes like if exists). Broadcasts realtime counts if room is live.
Auth user likes the live room (removes dislike if exists). Broadcasts realtime counts if room is live.

get.description: Get current user's reaction (like/dislike/none)
Public reactions count

post.description: Start a scheduled live room (owner or admin)

get.description: Public stats (viewer_count realtime + totals from DB)

post.description: Keep viewer alive for realtime viewer_count (public)

delete.description: Deletes a media file by ID. Only the product owner can delete media.

post.description: Allows anyone to send a contact/support message

get.description: Returns paginated orders for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates an order from cart items after validating stock availability

get.description: Returns a specific order by ID

patch.description: Only pending orders can be cancelled

get.description: Search/filter products by query params with pagination.

post.description: Create a new product. Category must exist and must be a leaf category. Tags are strings; backend will normalize and get-or-create.

get.description: Get product details by UUID. Increments view_count only when requester is NOT admin and NOT the product owner. If unauthenticated, view_count increments.

put.description: Update product fields by id (UUID). Only product owner or admin can update. If tags is provided, tags will be replaced fully; if omitted, tags remain unchanged. Category must be a leaf category if provided.

delete.description: Delete a product by id (UUID). Only owner or admin can delete.

get.description: Get comments for a product with pagination

post.description: Adds a new comment to a specific product by product id (UUID).
post.summary: Add a comment to a product

post.description: Dislike a product (adds user to dislikes set). If user had liked, it will be removed.

delete.description: Remove dislike (removes user from dislikes set)

get.description: Returns whether the current authenticated user has liked or disliked the product.
get.summary: Get my engagement for a product

post.description: Like a product (adds user to likes set). If user had disliked, it will be removed.

delete.description: Remove like (removes user from likes set)

post.description: Uploads an image or video file to a product. Only the product owner can upload media.
post.summary: Upload media (image or video) to a product

post.description: Create or update current user's rating for a product (stored in Redis).

delete.summary: Delete my rating for a product

get.summary: Get my rating for a product

get.description: Returns avg/count and breakdown(1..5) from Redis.
Retrieve likes, dislikes, views, and engagement count for a product
Returns whether the authenticated user's profile is completed
get.summary: Check if user profile is completed

get.description: Retrieve user information by user ID (admin or public)

post.description: Allows users to report a product, comment, or another user

get.description: Get paginated products for an owner (public).
Authenticated realtime chat for a live room
Subscribe to live room public events (products updates etc.)
WebRTC signaling endpoint
